basic_details.job_title: NIPER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online For Estate & Security Officer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER) Estate & Security Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website niper.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIPER Estate & Security Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: As per GoI Orders for SC/ST/OBC/ESM/PwBD categories; 5 years for Departmental candidates

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor degree in any discipline from a recognised university/Institute
qualification.details: Bachelor degree in any discipline from a recognised university/Institute. Experience: 5 (Five) years of experience in commissioned service in Army/Navy/Air Force/Para Military Force or Police only not below the rank of Captain or equivalent /Dy. SP of police. Desirable: Preference will be given to the candidate with experience in Supervision and Maintenance of the campus in National Institutes.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIPER Estate & Security Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Estate & Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIPER Estate & Security Officer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Estate & Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIPER Estate & Security Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NIPER Estate & Security Officer position is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognized university or institute. Additional experience is also necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Estate & Security Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Estate & Security Officer post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Estate & Security Officer position?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the Estate & Security Officer post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 1000/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 56,100/- per month, which corresponds to Level-10 of the pay matrix.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection methods for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any preference for candidates with specific experience?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with experience in the supervision and maintenance of campuses in National Institutes.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the NIPER Estate & Security Officer recruitment is entirely online through the official NIPER website.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIPER located?
faq.answer: NIPER, for this recruitment, is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781101.
